title: lonicera hispida var. bracteata
intro: Lonicera hispida var. bracteata, also known as the hairy honeysuckle or bracted honeysuckle, is a deciduous shrub native to China and a variant of the Lonicera hispida species. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lonicera hispida var. bracteata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
